title: taraxacum sedulum
intro: Taraxacum sedulum, also known as the lesser dandelion or creeping cat's ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its creeping habit and small yellow flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum sedulum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Taraxacum sedulum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
